TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: And we spent there four weeks too. In '39, it was about the end of the camp. In the last few days, we formed groups. And we went for hikes in the mountains. And I was supposed to be one of the leaders of the groups. But I told them, listen, I cannot go. I have to go back to work. My vacation is through. And I have to be back. And

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
hikes in the mountains.
